rule: Average of both teams quality_score_10, scaled. Avoid one-sided mismatch inflation.

Reward closer team quality. Penalize heavy mismatches even if one team is elite.

Optional, dynamic to selected club. Do not hardcode Barcelona.
Show as separate label. Do not let timing distort football hype.
